untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'round number price levels' (0.00, 0.25, 0.50, integer multiples) and 'price clustering' at psychological points. No allowed indicator directly detects round number proximity or order book clustering intensity. The 'minimum price increment < 0.5%' requirement also cannot be expressed with allowed indicators. Partial approximation attempted using vol_ratio_20 for thin trading and price_pos_20 for extremes, but core round-number detection logic is missing.
translation_notes: CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction cannot be fully encoded in this schema which requires LONG or SHORT. Entry conditions approximated: high volatility (hvol_20 > 60th percentile ≈ 0.60), thin trading (vol_ratio_20 < 25th percentile ≈ 0.25), and price at extremes (price_pos_20 near 0 or 1). Exit on pivot break as proxy for 'decisively moving away from round number'. Hold period set to 1 session per spec.
